tasks.name: Save 3 quick, low-calorie family dinner recipes to a 'Weeknight Dinners' collection
tasks.description: Find dinner recipes that serve 4 people, take 45 minutes or less to cook, have at most 600 calories per serving, and are rated 4+ stars. Save the first 3 matching recipes into a collection named 'Weeknight Dinners'. Success is having exactly 3 recipes saved in that collection that meet all constraints.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Recipes' link in the main navigation menu.
In the meal type filter on the Recipes page, select the 'Dinner' option.
Use the time filter control to set the maximum cook time to '45 minutes'.
Use the calories filter to set the maximum calories per serving to '600'.
In the rating filter, select the '4 stars & up' checkbox.
In the servings filter, choose the '4 servings' option.
From the sort dropdown above the results, choose 'Rating: High to Low'.

From the filtered results list, for each of the first three recipe cards, click the card to open the recipe, click the 'Save' button, choose or create a collection named 'Weeknight Dinners', and then use the browser back button to return to the filtered recipe list before opening the next card.

tasks.name: Create a 'Rainy Day Plan' list with 5 free indoor activities for kids aged 5–8
tasks.description: Locate indoor activities suitable for children aged 5–8 that cost $0 and last no more than 60 minutes. Add the first 5 matching activities to a list named 'Rainy Day Plan'. Success is having exactly 5 activities in that list that meet age, location, cost, and duration limits.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Activities' link in the main navigation menu.
In the age group filter on the Activities page, select '5–8 years'.
In the location filter, choose the 'Indoors' option.
In the cost filter, select the '$0 / Free' option.
In the duration filter, set the maximum duration to '60 minutes'.
Scroll through the filtered activities and identify the first five different activity cards in the list.

For each of these five activity cards, click the card to open its details page, click the 'Add to List' button, and select or create a list named 'Rainy Day Plan' to add the activity before returning to the activity list.

tasks.name: Bookmark a beginner family mindfulness routine article (10–15 minutes, 10+ comments)
tasks.description: Search for a beginner-level family mindfulness routine article that is categorized under Wellbeing, has a session length of 10–15 minutes, was published within the last 2 years, and has at least 10 comments. Bookmark this article to your reading list. Success is having that specific article saved.
steps: From any page, click the search icon or search bar in the site header.
Type 'family mindfulness routine' into the search field and press Enter to run the search.
On the search results page, use the category filter to select the 'Wellbeing' category.
In the tags or level filter, select the 'Beginner' option.
Use the publish date filter to select the 'Last 2 years' range.
Locate the session length filter and select the '10–15 minutes' option.
Within the filtered results, identify the first article whose comment count badge indicates '10' or more comments and click its title to open the article page.
On the article page, click the bookmark icon or 'Save' button and choose the 'Add to Reading List' option to bookmark the article.

tasks.name: Add the cheaper of two highly rated family yoga mats under $60 to a 'Home Gym' list
tasks.description: In the shop section, find yoga mats for family workouts priced under $60 with ratings of at least 4.5 stars. Open the first two matching products, compare their prices, and add the cheaper one to a list named 'Home Gym'. Success is having the lower-priced of those two products saved to that list.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click the 'Shop' link in the main navigation menu.
In the shop sidebar or categories list, click the 'Fitness & Yoga' category.
In the category search field, type 'family yoga mat' and submit the search.
Use the price filter to set the maximum price to '$60'.
In the rating filter, select the '4.5 stars & up' checkbox.
From the filtered product list, open the first two different yoga mat product cards by clicking each card so that each product page opens in its own tab or window.
On the two open product pages, compare the listed prices and decide which yoga mat is cheaper, then on the cheaper product's page click the 'Add to List' button.
In the list selection dialog, choose an existing list named 'Home Gym' or create a new list with that exact name, and assign the selected yoga mat to that list.

tasks.name: Set newsletter preferences for 3 topics with weekly Monday delivery at 8:00 AM
tasks.description: Configure newsletter preferences to receive weekly emails on Mondays at 8:00 AM for exactly three topics: Healthy Recipes, Parenting Tips, and Mindfulness & Self-Care. Success is having these three topics selected with the specified frequency, day, and time saved.
steps: From the homepage, scroll to the bottom of the page and click the 'Newsletter Preferences' link in the footer.
On the newsletter preferences page, locate the topics section and select exactly three checkboxes: 'Healthy Recipes', 'Parenting Tips', and 'Mindfulness & Self-Care'.
Find the frequency dropdown menu and select 'Weekly' as the delivery frequency.
Use the day-of-week selector to choose 'Monday' as the delivery day.
In the email address input field, type 'family_tester@example.com'.
In the time-of-day dropdown, select '8:00 AM' as the preferred delivery time.
Click the 'Save Preferences' or equivalent button to submit and store these newsletter settings.

tasks.name: Post a targeted comment on a recent screen-time parenting article for ages 9–12
tasks.description: Find a parenting article about screen time rules for children aged 9–12, published within the past 12 months, and post a comment containing exactly 2 sentences that includes the phrase 'family agreement'. Success is having that comment submitted on the selected article.
steps: From any page, click the search bar in the header.
Type 'screen time rules' into the search field and press Enter.
On the search results page, use the category filter to select the 'Parenting' category.
In the age range filter, choose the '9–12 years' option.
Use the date filter to select the 'Past 12 months' range.
Click the first article that appears in the filtered results list to open its article page.
Scroll down to the comments section and click inside the comment text box.

Type a comment consisting of exactly two sentences that includes the phrase 'family agreement', for example: 'We created a family agreement to limit screen time on school nights. The clear rules have made evenings much calmer.'
In the name field associated with the comment form, type 'Jordan', and then click the 'Post Comment' button to submit the comment.

tasks.name: Build a weekend plan with 2 outdoor activities and 2 healthy snacks for kids aged 3–6
tasks.description: Use the planner to create a plan named 'Weekend Fun' that includes 2 outdoor activities and 2 healthy snack recipes for children aged 3–6. Assign both activities to Saturday and both snack recipes to Sunday. Success is having a Weekend Fun plan with exactly those 4 items scheduled on the correct days.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage and click the 'Planner' option in the main navigation menu.
On the planner page, create a new plan and type 'Weekend Fun' as the plan name, then confirm creation.
With the Weekend Fun plan open, click the 'Activities' tab in the planner sidebar.
Apply filters for age group '3–6 years', location 'Outdoors', and duration 'Under 2 hours'.
From the filtered activities list, click the 'Add to Planner' button on the first two activity cards and in the day selector choose 'Saturday' for each.
Next, click the 'Recipes' tab in the planner sidebar.
Apply filters for meal type 'Snacks', prep time 'Under 20 minutes', and a health filter such as 'Low sugar' or the closest available healthy-snack option.
From the filtered recipes list, click the 'Add to Planner' button on the first two recipe cards and assign both to 'Sunday' in the day selector.
Click the 'View Schedule' or 'Summary' button in the planner interface to open the overview of the 'Weekend Fun' plan with its scheduled items.

tasks.name: Create a monthly wellness budget of $200 across 3 categories using the budget planner
tasks.description: Use the Wellness Budget Planner tool to allocate a total monthly wellness budget of $200 across three categories: $80 for Healthy Groceries, $70 for Family Activities, and $50 for Subscriptions. Success is saving a budget for the upcoming month with these exact category names and amounts.
steps: From the homepage, click the 'Tools' link in the main navigation menu.
On the Tools page, click the 'Wellness Budget Planner' tool to open it.
In the total monthly budget input field, enter '200' as the overall wellness budget amount.
In the categories section, add a new category named 'Healthy Groceries' and set its amount field to '80'.
Add a second category named 'Family Activities' and set its amount field to '70'.
Add a third category named 'Subscriptions' and set its amount field to '50'.
In the month selector dropdown, choose the upcoming month (for example, select 'April' if the current month is March).
Click the 'Save Budget' button to store this monthly wellness budget configuration.

entities.name: Recipe
entities.description: Family recipes browsed, filtered, and added to collections or planner.

fields.name: tags
fields.description: Free-form tags for search and discovery.

entities.name: RecipeCollection
entities.description: Named collections of saved recipes (e.g., 'Weeknight Dinners').

entities.name: RecipeCollectionItem
entities.description: Membership of recipes within a recipe collection.

entities.name: Activity
entities.description: Family activities that can be filtered and added to lists or planner.

fields.name: materials
fields.description: List of required materials or supplies.

entities.name: ActivityList
entities.description: Named lists of saved activities (e.g., 'Rainy Day Plan').

entities.name: ActivityListItem
entities.description: Membership of activities within an activity list.

entities.name: Article
entities.description: Wellbeing and parenting articles that can be searched, filtered, bookmarked, and commented on.

entities.name: ReadingList
entities.description: Named reading lists of bookmarked articles (e.g., default 'Reading List').

entities.name: ReadingListItem
entities.description: Membership of articles within a reading list.

entities.name: Comment
entities.description: User comments on articles, displayed in article detail pages.

entities.name: Product
entities.description: Shop products such as family yoga mats that can be filtered and added to lists.

fields.name: features
fields.description: Key product features and bullet points.

entities.name: ProductList

entities.name: ProductListItem
entities.description: Membership of products within a product list.

entities.name: PlannerPlan
entities.description: Named plans in the Planner (e.g., 'Weekend Fun') that group scheduled activities and recipes.

entities.name: PlannerPlanItem

entities.name: WellnessBudget
entities.description: Monthly wellness budgets created in the Wellness Budget Planner tool.

entities.name: WellnessBudgetCategory
entities.description: Category allocations within a monthly wellness budget (e.g., Healthy Groceries, Family Activities, Subscriptions).

entities.name: NewsletterPreference
entities.description: Email newsletter topics and delivery settings for the single user.

fields.name: timeOfDay
fields.description: Preferred delivery time in HH:MM format, e.g., '08:00'.

fields.name: topics
fields.description: Selected topics. Each item is one of: healthy_recipes, parenting_tips, mindfulness_and_self_care, fitness_and_yoga, budgeting_and_finances, screen_time_and_technology.
